title: The Most Powerful Claude Code Feature In Months Dropped & Nobody is Talking About It
summary: Graphify is a non-RAG solution for analyzing large code bases by creating knowledge graphs. It reduces token usage and improves response accuracy compared to traditional methods for code understanding in Claude.
